title: Promise rejections should not be caught by try blocks
description: Promise rejections should not be caught by "try" blocksAnalyze your codeintentionality-logicalreliabilityBugtype-dependentWhy is this an issue?More InfoAn exception thrown inside a promise will not be caught by a nestingtryblock due to the asynchronous nature of execution.Promises are designed to propagate errors to the next error handler or catch() block in the promise chain. Promises are asynchronous and operate outside of the normal call stack. When a Promise is created, it is added to the microtask queue, which is processed after the current call stack has completed.
recommendation: Replace with the recommended alternative approach.

checks.message: Promise rejections should not be caught by try blocks.
